title: Flee On Sight
description: Your wild animals are now introverts ！
body: # 🐑 Flee On Sight Required Dependencies: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) ## Your animals are now introverts ！ Wild sheep, cows, and pigs will now stay alert when a player approaches them, just like wild animals in real life and in other games. ## Increase the difficulty of approaching wild animals, and make the experience more naturalistic. * Wild animals sprint away until the player is far enough, and even panic as a herd when one animal bolts. * Sneak and approach from behind to make it much easier to get close to them. * They exhibit group behaviors, fleeing together as a pack when one gets startled. * Approach with the food they like to flip them into a friendly state — but hurting them will make them flee again, except when the hit is delivered using the food they are tempted by. ## If you want to further change the behavior of horses, there's a special version dedicated to horses: [Zelda Horse Behavior](https://modrinth.com/mod/zelda-horse-behavior).
